meaning: n.瑞士人adj.瑞士的,瑞士人的
examples: I was eating ham and Swiss cheese on rye.
I want to keep my Swiss bank account open.
Millions were deposited in Swiss bank accounts.
Time and time again, travellers to Switzerland report back that Swiss efficiency truly does exist.
He later admitted that he had hidden about 600, 000 euros in a Swiss bank account.
